base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of whip_hit_effect — a effect_layer (explosion_vfx) from 1986 castlevania. spawns at whip-tip on hit connection. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: 2-frame impact flash — spawns at whip-tip on hit connection; small cross-burst sparks
